title: Show me everything I've written about being broke / no runway / bridge income
html:
Question

"Show me everything I've written about being broke / no runway / bridge income."

Synthesized answer

The financial-survival thread isn't a side-note in Yahir's corpus — it's a continuous baseline that goes loud during the Austin era and never actually quiets down. It runs on two parallel tracks Yahir has implicitly separated himself: the supply side (bridge income strategies) and the demand side (no runway discipline).

The earliest seeds are philosophical, not operational. In 2022 10 25 ahmad jamal stream he writes "Voluntary adversity" alongside "spend you life force well" and "Giving 100% at most efficient rate: 60mph = 20mpg long-term, 120mph = 10mpg." This is 2022 Yahir choosing the frame: discomfort is a feature, not a bug. There's also a fear of not doing line going back to 2019 08 12 keep things simple ("Fear of not doing is greater than fear of doing it") — the moral cover for the choice.

By late 2024 the discipline starts showing up in technical decisions. In the BroMenu spec, Yahir explicitly chooses to test on a physical iPhone "because I want to avoid paying for the apple developer fee" and instructs himself to "reduce API call costs by caching responses wherever possible." The spec is unusually QA-thorough for a solo founder pre-launch — a tell that he can't afford to ship a broken thing.

Mid-2025 introduces the bridge income mechanically. 2025 05 30 todos is full of recurring "pay for ISSA exam" entries — Yahir was getting certified as a personal trainer to anchor the gym job that would later become the overnight shift. The Austin move logistics ("decide on official move day," "apply to apartments") run parallel to the Brotein launch work — he's planning the geographical move and the income bridge in the same note.

Then comes the canonical document: 2025 09 23 how im scraping by, written 2-5am during his first weeks in austin tx. This is the most line-item-honest financial note in the corpus. "Barber school haircut / shitty $1.5/lbs chicken thighs / absolutely striking deals on fb marketplace / good grace of my mom / good grace of my dad / haven't eaten out / have applied and am going to receive food stamps / no new gym, $15 a month planet still / DoorDash for a cushion." And the demand-side voice: "I just got mad at myself mentally for spending $5.50 on a blended Horchata. I'm seriously making it out the mud." And: "I am so fucking broke I needed to change my oil for $55 dollars and I know that's going to fuck me." And the load-bearing one: "Sell my gun at a 50% discount to pay rent and ask my dad embarrassingly for an advance." The note ends with "Plasma donation?!!" — the closest thing to a cry for help in the entire vault.

The tactical inventory itself: overnight gym shifts as primary income, doordash as cushion, planet fitness $15/mo instead of upgrading, barber-school haircuts, $1.50/lb chicken thighs, fb marketplace arbitrage, applied food stamps, no eating out, selling possessions at discount, dad-as-last-resort. The eating tactic is itself a system: whole foods hot bar finesses, heb sushi-and-dump-it, Market of Choice same trick across geographies. There's even a gas-pump trick described.

By early 2026, the financial reality is implicit in the strategic question. 2026 01 11 untitled (also 2-5am): "Why aren't we clicking and feeling the fire with rankett." Translation: the runway is short and the conviction needs to be checked.

The synthesis: Yahir framed the broke years as voluntary in 2022, hardened the discipline in 2024, lived the literal version in late 2025, and is currently betting that Rankett arrives before the self funded buffer less grind breaks him. The gym job exit is the milestone that ends the bridge-income phase. The "good grace of my mom / good grace of my dad" line is the quiet load-bearing fact under the entire founder posture — the runway he's actually running on isn't capital, it's family.

Sources

  • 2019 08 12 keep things simple — fear of not doing origin
  • 2022 10 25 ahmad jamal stream — voluntary adversity frame, "spend you life force well"
  • 2024 12 21 todos — cost-conscious technical decisions
  • 2025 05 30 todos — ISSA certification + Austin move planning
  • 2025 09 23 how im scraping by — the canonical document
  • raw/apple-notes/2026-01-11-untitled.md — implicit financial pressure on Rankett conviction
  • Concepts: bridge income strategies · no runway discipline · voluntary adversity · fear of not doing · debt of gratitude
  • Entities: austin tx · planet fitness · doordash · whole foods · heb · market of choice · fb marketplace · issa cpt
  • Memory — "Self-funded, no runway buffer. Has to survive AND build simultaneously."
